t-bone-recipe-with-garlic-and-thyme-come.original_name: Receta de T-Bone con ajo y tomillo
instructions: Sazona los T-Bone con sal marina y pimienta negra molida por ambos lados.
Pela los dientes de ajo y trocea finamente.
Warm up a frying pan and add butter with olive oil.
When butter melts and both ingredients blend, add garlic and purge for two minutes with medium heat.
Agrega la ramita de tomillo y mezcla para que suelte su sabor y aroma.
It incorporates T-Bone steaks and cooks for 5 to 6 minutes from each side until they are sealed or at the cooking point as you wish.
Once ready, serve them and wet them if butter sauce, thyme and garlic remained. He's with the garrison of your choice.

taco-chili-from-publix.name: Taco Chili From Publix
instructions: Preheat large, nonstick sauté pan on medium-high heat for 2 to 3 minutes. Place beef in pan (wash hands); brown for 5 to 7 minutes, stirring to crumble meat, or until no pink remains. Stir in taco seasoning; remove meat from pan.
Combine remaining ingredients in slow cooker; stir in meat. Cover and cook on High for 3 to 4 hours or on Low for 6 to 8 hours. Serve.

Nut instead of walnut, almond, kaju can be used.
Dry grape can be added to dried pieces, dry fig, palm or cranberry.
You can add drop chocolate if you want to make it more attractive for kids.
Instead of ginger, muskat, kakule or vanilla extract can be used.

tamales-de-frijoles-bean-tamales.name: Tamales De Frijoles (bean Tamales)

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Start the tamales: Place corn husks into a bowl, cover with boiling water, and soak for about 3 hours. Drain, place on a work surface, and cover with a clean, damp towel.
Make the salsa: Place ancho chiles into a saucepan, cover with water, and bring to a boil over medium heat; cook until soft, about 10 minutes. Drain.
Combine ancho chiles, garlic, cumin, salt, and pepper in a blender. Add water and blend until smooth. Strain through a sieve.

Finish the tamales: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add 1/2 of the salsa and cook for 3 to 5 minutes. Stir in refried beans until well combined; cook until most of the liquid has evaporated, about 5 minutes. Remove from the heat.
Beat lard with an electric mixer in a large bowl until fluffy. Gradually add masa flour and beat until well combined. Add remaining salsa and continue beating until dough is uniformly red in color.

Select one wide corn husk. Starting 2 inches from the bottom of the husk, spread about 2 tablespoons masa mixture over the surface, ending about 1/4 inch from the top. Place 1 tablespoon beans and 1 jalapeño slice in the center of masa mixture. Fold the sides of the husk together, one over the other. Fold the bottom of the husk over the seam of the two folded sides. Repeat to make remaining tamales.

Place a steamer insert into a saucepan and fill with water to just below the bottom of the steamer. Bring water to a boil. Add tamales with the open side up; cook until filling is heated through and separates from the husk, about 1 hour.
Let tamales rest for 15 minutes before serving.

tempeh-bowls-with-nut-butter-sauce.name: Tempeh Bowls With Nut Butter Sauce

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Heat 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a large heavy pot over medium-high. Cook two 8-oz. packages tempeh until golden brown and crisp, about 3 minutes per side. Transfer to a plate. Let cool slightly; tear into large pieces and set aside.

Wipe out pot and pour in water to come 1" up sides. Cover and bring to a boil. Uncover pot and place a large steamer, colander, or mesh sieve inside (bottom should not touch water). Place 4 cups 1" cubes peeled butternut squash in steamer, cover, and steam until almost tender, 15–20 minutes.

Meanwhile, whisk one 1" piece ginger, peeled, finely grated, 1 garlic clove, finely grated, ¼ cup nut butter (such as peanut or almond), 1 Tbsp. soy sauce, and 2 Tbsp. unseasoned rice vinegar in a small bowl. Gradually pour in warm water, whisking, until sauce is loose enough to drizzle (amount of water will depend on the consistency of your nut butter).

Uncover pot and place 1 large bunch broccolini, halved lengthwise if thick, on top of squash. Re-cover; steam until broccolini is bright green and crisp-tender and squash is tender but not mushy, about 5 minutes.
While the broccolini is steaming, cook 4 large eggs in a large saucepan of boiling water, 8 minutes. Drain and run under cold water to cool. Peel, then tear into large pieces and set aside.

Combine squash, broccolini, 2 Persian cucumbers, thinly sliced, and 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¾ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a large bowl. Drizzle with extra-virgin olive oil and a little unseasoned rice vinegar; toss to coat.
Divide vegetable mixture among shallow bowls; arrange reserved tempeh and eggs around. Drizzle sauce over and top with mint sprigs.

teriyaki-chicken-skewers-recipe-comedera.name: Teriyaki Chicken Skewers Recipe
teriyaki-chicken-skewers-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de brochetas de pollo teriyaki fáciles

ingredients.item: 500 g de pechuga de pollo (cortada en cubos)

instructions: Sumerge las brochetas de madera en agua durante al menos 20 minutos para evitar que se quemen al cocinar.
In a bowl, mix Teriyaki sauce, sesame oil, honey and minced garlic to create the marinade.
Add chicken cubes to the marinade and make sure they are well covered. Let marines for at least 30 minutes in the refrigerator.
While the chicken seines, prepare your vegetables by cutting the pepper and onion into pieces of similar size.
Preheat your grill or frying pan with medium-high heat.
Grape into the knipes by alternating between chicken, pepper and onion till they are filled.
Put the brocketas into the grill and cook them, spinning them every 2-3 minutes, till the chicken is well-cooked and the plants are slightly carbonized, about 12-15 minutes in total.
During the last few minutes of cooking, brush with a little more Teriyaki sauce to enhance the taste.

thai-style-chicken-thighs-with-peanut-sa.name: Thai Style Chicken Thighs With Peanut Sauce Recipe
thai-style-chicken-thighs-with-peanut-sa.original_name: Receta de muslos de pollo al estilo tailandés con salsa de maní

ingredients.item: 1  trozo de jengibre fresco rallado ((2 cm))
1 cup of sugar free peanut cream
1 cda de pasta de curry rojo.

instructions: Mix into a bowl the soy sauce, garlic, ginger, brown sugar and sesame oil.
Put the chicken thighs in the marinade and make sure they are well covered. Let rest for at least 30 minutes in the refrigerator (you can marinate at night for a more intense taste).
It purifies a frying pan or grill with medium-high heat.
Kick chicken thighs for 6-8 minutes per side, till they are golden and well cooked (internal temperature should be 74-3).
In a saucepan with medium heat, mix the peanut cream, coconut milk, soy sauce, curry paste, lemon juice and brown sugar.
It constantly revels until all ingredients are integrated and the salsa has a smooth and homogenous texture. Add water little by little if necessary to adjust consistency.
Put chicken thighs onto a plate and have them with a peanut sauce.
Decora y disfruta.

the-new-england-express.name: The New England Express
instructions: Bring sugar and ⅓ cup water to a boil in a small saucepan, stirring to dissolve sugar. Remove from heat, add thyme sprigs, and cover. Let stand 10 minutes, then strain into a small jar. Let cool.
DO AHEAD: Syrup can be made 1 month ahead. Cover and chill.
Mix thyme syrup, cider, rum, lime juice, and bitters in a pitcher. Divide among rocks glasses filled with ice; top off with club soda. Garnish with thyme sprigs and lime slices.
DO AHEAD: Thyme syrup, cider, rum, lime juice, and bitters can be mixed 4 hours ahead. Cover and chill.

the-troy-monson.name: The Troy Monson
instructions: Bring sugar, fennel seeds, and ¼ cup water to a boil in a small saucepan over medium-high. Reduce heat to low and simmer, swirling occasionally, until sugar is dissolved, about 4 minutes. Let cool, then strain into a small bowl; discard solids.

For each cocktail, combine 2 oz. vodka, 1½ oz. blood orange juice, 1 oz. lemon juice, and ½ oz. reserved fennel syrup in a cocktail shaker and fill with ice. Shake until outside of shaker is frosty, about 30 seconds. Strain into a rocks glass filled with cracked ice and garnish with 1 fennel slice.

the-witty-comeback.name: The Witty Comeback
instructions: Combine rye, Averna, lemon juice, and ginger simple syrup in a cocktail shaker; fill shaker with ice. Shake until outside of shaker is frosty, about 30 seconds. Strain into a coupe glass or a rocks glass filled with ice and garnish with orange twist.

thousand-leaves-of-pastry-cream-teleculi.name: Thousand Leaves Of Pastry Cream

ingredients.item: 2 embalagens de massa folhada de compras (4 placas)

instructions: Start the oven at 180 degrees. Extend the plates of leafy dough separately on the table sprinkled with flour and each cut into a circle of 20 cm in diameter. Place a circle on the oven tray previously passed by cold water, cover with vegetal paper, have on top a form so that the dough does not rise and take it to the oven for 20 minutes. Reduce the oven to 170oC and leave another 10 minutes or until golden and dry. Repeat the operation with the other mass circles.

Take a pot to the fire with the milk and let it warm up. In a bowl, beat the eggs with the sugar and vanilla sugar until a cuddly cream, add the flour, stir well and then add the milk, slowly and always stirring. Lie down for a pot, light the fire stirring continuously until boiling, remove from the fire, lie down in a bowl, cover with adherent film and let it cool.

Tap the light slightly, add the powdered sugar and the lemon drops and stir well. Break the chocolate into pieces, throw it in a bowl, take it to melt in a sea bath or microwave, remove and stir well until it is warm. Make a circle with the glace and let it dry a little. Throw the melted chocolate inside a paper cone, spiral on top and pass a toothpick to do the effect you see on the photo.

Lay the cream on a pastry bag with a mouth. Put another circle of dough on a plate, cover it with 1/3 of the cream, place another circle on top, cover with another 1/3 of the cream, have another circle and spread the rest of the cream. Then cover with the circle you decorated and serve.

tiny-potatoes-with-sour-cream-and-onions.name: Tiny Potatoes With Sour Cream And Onions

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
(packed) coarsely chopped mixed tender herbs (such as parsley

instructions: Preheat oven to 450°. Place potatoes on a rimmed baking sheet. Drizzle 2 Tbsp. oil over, sprinkle with garlic powder, sumac, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and season with pepper. Toss to coat, then arrange potatoes in an even layer. Roast until nearly tender and beginning to brown in spots, 18–22 minutes.
Meanwhile, place onions in a medium bowl. Drizzle a little oil over and season with salt and pepper; toss to coat.

Carefully remove potatoes from oven and shake baking sheet to turn potatoes and scoot to one side. Arrange onions in a single layer in empty space on baking sheet; reserve bowl. Return baking sheet to oven and roast potatoes and onions until potatoes are browned and fork-tender and onions are charred around the edges, 13–17 minutes. Let cool slightly.

Scoop sour cream into reserved bowl; season with salt and pepper. Spread sour cream onto a platter or into a large shallow bowl and top with potatoes and onions. Scatters herbs over and sprinkle generously with pepper.

toasted-guajillo-chile-salsa.name: Toasted Guajillo Chile Salsa
instructions: Heat a large dry cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat. Working in batches, toast chiles until slightly puffed and fragrant, 15–20 seconds per side. Let cool.
Using kitchen scissors and working over a medium bowl, cut chiles into thin rings, reserving seeds. Cover with 2 cups very hot water and let soak for 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, heat the same skillet over medium-high heat. Add garlic; cook, turning often, until tender and skin is lightly charred, about 8 minutes. Let cool. Peel; trim ends.
Transfer chiles with seeds and liquid to a blender; add roasted garlic, 1 1/2 tsp. salt, and remaining ingredients. Pulse until a thick, coarse purée forms. Season with salt.

tomato-basil-mozzarella-melt.name: Tomato Basil Mozzarella Melt
instructions: Place 6 Sister Schuberts Mini Baguettes on a baking sheet and bake rolls according to directions on package. Cool baguettes.
Decrease oven temperature to 191°C.

Carefully slice each Sister Schuberts Mini Baguette in half horizontally. Spread one side of each baguette with pesto. Continue to layer with tomatoes, fresh mozzarella and sprinkle with salt and pepper. Wrap each sandwich in a large piece of aluminum foil, place packages on baking sheet and bake 7 to 10 minutes or until sandwiches are warm and the cheese has melted. Unwrap sandwiches, open and add fresh basil leaves. Serve.

tomato-green-tart-lezzet.name: Tomato Green Tart
instructions: 1. Clean the Maydanoz and dereot and shore on the robot.
2. 1 tablespoon of butter and soften the rest in the room heat and chop small.
3. Take flour and dough kneading bowl.
4. Add chopped butter, parsley, dereaus and salt and knead a smooth dough.
5. Wrap the ball shape verip stretch foil.
6. Wait for 30 minutes in refrigerator.
7. Open the dough from the refrigerator with 3 mm thickness.
8. Cut 4 dough each with 15 cm diameter.
9. Prepare fine strips from increased dough and decorate the dough in the form of the apartment.
10. Cook the dough into the oiled oven tray and bake it in the oven, which is already heated to 180 degrees.
11. 11. Clean and fine chop fresh onions.
12. melt the butter in the pan and roast onion.
12. August Take the Tuzla taste and from the stove.
14 July Share it on dough.
15. thoroughly mix the lor cheese with cheese in a bowl.
16. Cheese mixture broadcasting in order to cover above onions.
17. September slice tomatoes and decorate weighing with fresh onion handle.
18. Cook the cheese in the hot oven for 2-3 minutes until the light melt.
19. September Stove the pots and sprinkle the red pepper.
20. Serve hot or warm.

tomato-zucchini-squash-skillet.name: Tomato Zucchini Squash Skillet

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat; cook and stir onion in melted butter until translucent, 5 to 8 minutes. Stir in zucchini and yellow squash; cook until tender, 10 to 15 minutes. Mix in tomatoes and cook until they start to break down, about 5 more minutes. Season with kosher salt and black pepper.

tomato-mushroom-and-zucchini-zucchini-wr.name: Tomato, Mushroom, And Zucchini Zucchini-wrapped Quiche
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200°C). Grease a 12-cup muffin tin with nonstick spray.
Trim the ends from the zucchini, then slice lengthwise with a vegetable peeler.
Line the muffin cups with the zucchini strips.
In a large bowl, whisk together eggs, tomato, diced zucchini, mushroom, milk, salt, and pepper.
Add a bit of crumbled feta to each zucchini cup.
Divide the egg mixture evenly among the cups.
Bake for 18 minutes, until the edges are slightly browned.
Enjoy!

toscano-soup.name: Toscano Soup

ingredients.item: Idahoan® roasted garlic flavored mashed potatoes
Sea salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Cook the bacon in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Drain on a paper towel.
Crumble and set aside.
Remove the turkey Italian sausage links from the casing and place in the Dutch oven along with the diced onion.
Saute until the onion is soft and the sausage is cooked.
Add the garlic, stirring frequently for 45 seconds.
Add the chicken stock, milk, and potatoes.
Add Swiss chard or kale along with the crushed red pepper, sea salt and fresh cracked black pepper to taste.
Cook on medium low for 15 minutes or until hot.
Ladle into soup bowls and garnish with crumbled bacon.

tostones-twice-fried-green-plantains-wit.name: Tostones (twice-fried Green Plantains) With Mayo Ketchup Dipping Sauce
instructions: Combine mayonnaise, ketchup, and garlic in a small bowl. Cover and refrigerate sauce for at least 30 minutes before serving.

Heat oil in a deep fryer or large saucepan to 177°C (175 degrees C). Fry plantains in hot oil until golden but not browned, 5 to 7 minutes. Drain on a paper towel-lined plate. Allow plantains to cool slightly.

Smash each plantain in a tostonero or with the bottom of a clean can. Fry flattened plantains again in hot oil until golden and crisp, 5 to 7 minutes more. Season with garlic salt and serve with sauce.

trabzon-style-kuymak-recipe-lezzet.name: Trabzon Style Kuymak Recipe

ingredients.item: 150 gr trabzon cheese or wire cheese (rejected)

You can choose herbal margarine for an option of Vegan.
You can also try full wheat flour or pollen.

You can completely change the water with milk, get more creamy and rich taste.

Less salt cheeses can be preferred for a lighter version.
By increasing the amount of cheese, you can get a more dense and stranded quantum.
Kuymak is often served simple, but you can add according to small amount of pepper or red pepper to your taste.

traditional-drowned-cakes-from-guadalaja.name: Traditional Drowned Cakes From Guadalajara
instructions: Now with clear chilies, we'll get them through a hot griddle and get them killed. We'll rotate them so they'll cook as evenly as possible, throughout their surface. We'll put them back later.
We will also wash well the tomato and then cook them for about 15 minutes, with low fire.

Mientras tanto, pelaremos la cebolla y la cortaremos en grandes trozos irregulares (solamente para facilitar el trabajo de la licuadora o robot de cocina que utilizaremos para procesarla posteriormente).
We'll also peel our garlic teeth.
Then we'll get two of his garlic teeth to a blender with half of his onion cuts, his pits drained, half a cup of cooking water, a teaspoon of salt, another of ground oregan, half of cumin and nails.

We'll process all the ingredients well in the blender, till we get a salsa as homogenous as we can. We will try and if necessary we will correct the date with more salt or spices. If you wish, you can add a sugar point.
Luego, reservaremos la salsa.

Prepararemos otra salsa con la otra mitad de la cebolla, los dos dientes de ajo restantes, los chiles asados, el vinagre y un toque de sal al gusto. Simplemente, procesaremos todos los ingredientes en la licuadora o robot de cocina.
After getting a uniform mixture, try the sauce and fix the date if necessary.
Reservaremos esta segunda salsa.
Calentaremos las carnitas y los frijoles y luego, abriremos los bolillos por la mitad.
En un plato grande, dejaremos a la mano la salsa de jitomate. El plato debe ser lo suficientemente grande como para sumergir las tortas.
Untaremos los panes (al centro) con un poco de frijoles refritos. Luego, dispondremos un poco de carnitas como relleno, y cerraremos cada torta.
Later, we will quickly sink every cake into the bowl with tomato sauce and after we get it out we will bath with some chili sauce.
Finalmente, rociaremos con un poco del jugo de los limones (previamente cortados en cuartos).
Puedes decorar tus tortas ahogadas con una juliana de cebollas o con cebollas encurtidas.

traditional-manchego-ratatouille-grandmo.name: Traditional Manchego Ratatouille, Grandmother's Recipe
traditional-manchego-ratatouille-grandmo.original_name: Pisto manchego tradicional, la receta casera de la abuela
instructions: We put extra virgin olive oil and add garlic and onion.
Rehogamos unos minutos e incorporamos los pimientos verdes.
We had a few minutes and added pumpkins, without peeling and also cut into pits.
We leave another few minutes and finally we add the shredded tomato or grated tomato, some salt, fresh ground black pepper and ground cumin.
We cook everything with soft heat till the tomato's fried.

traditional-molotoff-teleculinaria.name: Traditional Molotoff
instructions: Lay the yolks on a pot, add half the sugar and water, mix and then take it to the fire, stirring until it thickens. Go through the hammock, lie in a bowl and let it cool.

Start the oven at 180oC, grease a hole with margarine and sprinkle it with sugar. In a bowl, beat the clears in a very firm castle, gathering the remaining 150 g of sugar gradually and always beating. Finally, add the liquid caramel and wrap.

Pour the previous preparation into the form, smooth and bake for 16 minutes. Remove, deform, put on a wide dish, let it cool, water with the gem candy that prepared and serve decorated with roasted rolled almond.

traditional-sourdough-bun-argiro.name: Traditional Sourdough Bun

ingredients.item: 1 cup of milk butter at room temperature
1/2 cup natural cooking fat at room temperature
1 croco at room temperature for grinding
1 cup of milk butter at room temperature
1/2 cup natural cooking fat at room temperature
1 croco at room temperature for grinding

instructions: We prepare the leaven first. From the night before, dissolve the yeast in bowls.
Add 1 pinch of sugar, a little lukewarm water and some flour to become a thin dough.
Cover the leaven well (use a large bowl because it swells a lot).
We leave it all night on the kitchen counter.

triangle-pastry-with-purslane-lezzet.name: Triangle Pastry With Purslane

ingredients.item: Half water cup grated fresh cheese Home

instructions: 1. Take a pit of the necessary materials for the dough except water.
2. yoğurun by adding water to the joints of pulp.
3. Cover over with a damp cloth for 45 minutes.
4. Extract Semizot.
5. Crochet the backbone size.
6. Blend the semitask leaves, onion, cheese, delicate sour, slightly roasted in sunflower oil, salt and spices to the bowl.
7. Pour the dough into the countertop and split into two.
8. Open it with the help of roller to be slightly thicker than the flour serpip yufka.
9. Cut in the form of the apartment with the help of the cup.
10. Share it from mortar to the middle and close it in the triangle.
11. 11. Heat the sunflower oil.
12. Shake the crumbs.
12. August Serve.

tricolor-pepper-relish.name: Tricolor Pepper Relish
instructions: Cut peppers into 1/4" dice; transfer to a medium heatproof bowl. Pour 4 cups boiling water over; let steep for 5 minutes. Drain.

Stir remaining ingredients in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat until sugar dissolves. Add peppers; simmer until almost dry, 13-14 minutes. Transfer to a jar. Cover and let cool slightly; chill. Serve within 2 weeks.

trouble-cookies.name: Trouble Cookies

ingredients.prep: such as Heath Bits O’ Brickle

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 350°. Toast cashews on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing halfway through, until golden, 8–10 minutes. Let cool before chopping into pea-size pieces.

Beat butter and brown sugar in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment on medium speed until light and fluffy, about 5 minutes. Add egg and vanilla and beat 1 minute. Add sorghum flour, all-purpose flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt and beat just until combined. Add cashews, coconut, and toffee. Mix just until combined. The dough will be very soft at this point. Wrap tightly and chill at least 30 minutes or up to 2 days (if chilling for more than 30 minutes, transfer to a sheet of parchment paper or plastic wrap, flatten into a disk, and wrap tightly to prevent drying).

Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 375°. Divide dough into 16 equal portions (about 1½ oz.; 45 g each). Working quickly so that the dough doesn’t warm up, roll each portion into a ball with your hands. Divide cookies between 2 parchment-lined baking sheets, spacing at least 3" apart. Press gently with palm of your hand to flatten and decorate with a sprinkle of shredded coconut.

Bake cookies, rotating baking sheets top to bottom and front to back halfway through, until edges are brown but centers are still a little gooey, 12–14 minutes. Let cookies cool on baking sheets before serving.
Do ahead: Dough can be formed into balls 2 weeks ahead; freeze on a baking sheet until solid. Transfer to an airtight container or freezer bags and keep frozen. Bake from frozen; cookies may take a few minutes longer to bake. Cookies can be baked 2 days ahead; store airtight at room temperature.

tteokbokki.name: Tteokbokki

ingredients.prep: cut in half crosswise on a diagonal
bulbs cut into  0.25" pieces, leaves sliced into 1" pieces
thinly sliced on a diagonal, divided

instructions: Bring anchovies, kombu, ¼ small sliced onion, 2 smashed garlic cloves, and 3½ cups water to a boil in a small pot. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer at least 15 minutes and up to 45 minutes (the longer the stock simmers, the more flavor it will have).

Strain anchovy stock through a fine-mesh sieve into a glass measuring cup; discard solids. Return stock to pot and heat over medium. Add fish cakes and simmer until just heated through, about 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, mix gochujang, soy sauce, and gochugaru in a small bowl.

Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high until hot. Add rice cakes and cook, turning occasionally, until crisp, about 5 minutes. Add remaining 2 sliced onions and 6 sliced garlic cloves and cook, stirring, until softened, about 2 minutes. Add gochujang mixture and cook, stirring occasionally, until combined and fragrant, about 1 minute more.

Add 2½ cups anchovy stock along with fish cakes to rice cake mixture and stir to combine. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, stirring occasionally, until sauce is thickened and rice cakes are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add bok choy and half of scallions and toss until well combined, adding more anchovy stock by the tablespoon to thin if needed. Cook, tossing occasionally, until bok choy is wilted, about 2 minutes.
Transfer tteokbokki to a platter. Top with eggs, sesame seeds, and remaining scallions.

tuna-panini-melt.name: Tuna Panini Melt

ingredients.item: Solid white albacore tuna in water

instructions: Combine tuna, mayonnaise, balsamic vinegar, onion, and dill pickle in a bowl.
Spread tuna mixture over 2 slices bread. Top with American cheese and remaining 2 slices bread.
Preheat a panini press according to manufacturer's instructions.
Cook in the preheated panini press until bread crispy and cheese melted, 3 to 4 minutes.

tuna-white-bean-and-red-onion-salad.name: Tuna, White Bean, And Red Onion Salad

ingredients.item: Cooked white beans (see cannellini beans with garlic and sage)
6-ounce cans tuna packed in olive oil

instructions: Place beans in large bowl. Add tuna and onion; drizzle with oil. Toss gently to combine. Season with salt and generous amount of freshly ground black pepper.

turkey-bacon-breakfast-sliders.name: Turkey Bacon Breakfast Sliders
instructions: Preheat Griddler, fitted with the griddle plates, to 218°C (220°C) and grease with nonstick spray.
On a cutting board, arrange 4 slices of turkey bacon vertically directly next to each other. Weave the 5 remaining bacon slices horizontally through the vertical pieces.
Wrap the bacon weave onto a rolling pin, taking care to keep it intact. Carefully transfer the bacon to the griddle and carefully unroll in an even layer.
Close the Griddler and cook for 8 minutes, until the bacon is fully cooked and has begun to crisp up. Remove the bacon weave from the Griddler.
Use a bread knife to slice the intact loaf of rolls crosswise so that the bottoms can be separated from the tops. Set aside the top half.
Place the bacon weave on the bottom half of the rolls.
Distribute the scrambled eggs on top of the bacon weave, smoothing them into an even layer.
Place the cheese on top of the eggs, covering as much area as possible.
Place the lettuce on top of the cheese.
Place the tomato slices evenly on top of the lettuce leaves.
Replace the top half of the rolls and slice the individual sliders.
Enjoy!

tuscan-white-beans-in-tomato-sauce.name: Tuscan White Beans In Tomato Sauce

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place beans in a large pot. Cover with water and stir in baking soda. Soak at room temperature for 8 to 12 hours.

Drain and rinse beans; return to the pot. Cover with water and bring to a boil over medium-high heat. Reduce heat and simmer until beans are tender yet firm to the bite, about 25 minutes. Drain beans, reserving water. Set beans and cooking water aside.
Heat olive oil in the same pot over medium heat. Sauté garlic and sage in hot oil until fragrant, about 2 minutes. Add beans; cook and stir until beans absorb the aroma of garlic and sage.

Pour in tomato sauce; bring to a simmer. Cook, stirring occasionally, until beans are soft but not mushy, 10 to 15 minutes. Add reserved cooking water to keep sauce from burning if needed. Season with salt and pepper. Serve warm.
